name: Cryptocurrency Mining Command Execution
notes: This rule triggers when a cryptocurrency mining command is detected. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches "Command" IS NOT NULL OR "Command Arguments" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
when any of Command (custom), Command Arguments (custom) match (?i).*\b(miner|pool|coinhive|cryptonight|ethereum|xrp|stellar|monero|bitcoin)\b.*
TD_list: APPLY Cryptocurrency Mining Command Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches "Command" IS NOT NULL OR "Command Arguments" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when any of Command (custom), Command Arguments (custom) match (?i).*\b(miner|pool|coinhive|cryptonight|ethereum|xrp|stellar|monero|bitcoin)\b.*
RED_list: Event name: Cryptocurrency Mining Command Line
Event description: A cryptocurrency mining command has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
